# nayatel_volumes (Data Source)

List available volumes.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "nayatel_volumes" "available" {}

output "unattached_volumes" {
  value = [for v in data.nayatel_volumes.available.volumes : v.id if v.instance_id == ""]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `volumes` (Attributes List) List of volumes (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--volumes))

<a id="nestedatt--volumes"></a>
### Nested Schema for `volumes`

Read-Only:

- `bootable` (Boolean)
- `id` (String)
- `instance_id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `size` (Number)
- `status` (String)
